description: Byzantine Quality Gate branch protection configuration for Kagami. This config blocks merges when Byzantine quality scores fall below 90/100 on any dimension.

quality_gate.comment: All Byzantine dimensions must score >= 90/100 to pass. h(x) >= 0. Always. craft(x) → ∞ always

what_each_dimension_measures.technical: UI correctness, element presence, standards compliance
what_each_dimension_measures.aesthetic: Visual harmony, spacing, color usage, typography
what_each_dimension_measures.accessibility: Touch targets (44pt+), contrast (WCAG AA), focus indicators
what_each_dimension_measures.polish: Animation smoothness (60fps), transitions, attention to detail
what_each_dimension_measures.delight: Joy moments, surprise elements, memorable interactions

github_ui: 2. Add branch protection rule for 'main' and 'develop'
3. Enable 'Require status checks to pass before merging'
4. Search and select 'Byzantine Quality Gate' as a required check
5. Enable 'Require branches to be up to date before merging' for main
gh_cli: gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/branches/main/protection -X PUT -f required_status_checks='strict:true,contexts:["Byzantine Quality Gate"]' -f enforce_admins=false
